name: SoTellUs
highlight_text: Best suited for Practitioners and Service Area Businesses
description:
What SoTellUs Does

SoTellUs is specially designed for practitioners and small businesses. If you’re one, it’s worth a look. It will help you collect reviews and grow your business. It will also integrate easily with any marketplace or platform you’re using to sell your services, which is a major plus.

Source: sotellus.com

Key Features

  • Consolidated view of reviews from Google, Facebook, Yelp, and SoTellUs in one dashboard.
  • Ability to instantly reply to reviews with questions or concerns about your business.
  • Automated system to send review invites via text or email from the SoTellUs app.
  • Option to upload a CSV file with customer contacts for bulk review invite campaigns.
  • Integrations with over 3,000 software programs like Salesforce, Jobber, QuickBooks via Zapier.
  • Trigger automated review invites based on job closures, payments, project completions etc.

Benefits of SoTellUs

  • Monitor your online reputation across major review sources from a centralized location.
  • Promptly address customer feedback to resolve issues and prevent escalations.
  • Generate more reviews easily through automated text/email outreach.
  • Streamline review acquisition by uploading contacts in bulk.
  • Leverage existing software and data to identify optimal review invite timing.
  • Increase review volume by automating requests at key customer touchpoints.

Pricing

Price available after demo

Pros

✅Video review capabilities

✅Practitioner-focused support and features

Cons

❌Limited review site integrations

❌No AI automation
